{{Quote|On heavily populated worlds in those sectors, such as Uviuy Exen in Shwuy and Trammen in Harron, every single line squad has been completely armed with light repeating blasters.|A compilation of Galactic Empire documents by Rebel Alliance Major Arhul Hextrophon|<ref name="IS2" />}}
'''Trammen''' was a heavily populated [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] located in the [[Harron sector/Legends|Harron sector]]. Situated on the [[Ootmian Pabol/Legends|''Ootmian Pabol'']] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace route]], around the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the beginning of the [[Alsakan Conflicts/Legends|Alsakan Conflicts]], it was a part of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as well as the [[Exploitation Region]] that was controlled by the [[Merchant/Legends|trading]] conglomerates known as the [[Grand Companies]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Trammen served as a [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] staging area.

==Description==
Trammen was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="IS2" /> located in the [[Trammen system/Legends|Trammen system]], a part of the [[Harron sector/Legends|Harron sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was situated on the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace route]] known as the [[Ootmian Pabol/Legends|''Ootmian Pabol'']], which linked it to the [[Chanosant system/Legends|Chanosant system]]<ref name="TEA" /> and the [[Belasco system/Legends|Belasco system]] of the [[Belasco sector/Legends|Belasco sector]].<ref name="ExpansionRegion">{{SW|url=news/essential-atlas-extra-expansion-region|text=Essential Atlas Extra: Expansion Region}}</ref>

==History==
Trammen was a part of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] by [[17,000 BBY]]. Around that [[Time/Legends|time]], which saw the [[First Alsakan Conflict|beginning]] of a [[Alsakan Conflicts/Legends|series]] of [[Politics/Legends|conflicts]] between the planet [[Alsakan/Legends|Alsakan]], the Republic's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] world [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], and their respective allies, Trammen was a part of the [[Exploitation Region]], a territory that was actively controlled by the [[Grand Companies]]—Coruscant-affiliated [[Merchant/Legends|trading]] conglomerates based along the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] hyperlane known as [[the Spin]]. In addition, the segment of the ''Ootmian Pabol'' on which Trammen was situated was under the control of Coruscant.<ref name="EGTW" />

[[File:LightRepeater-NEGWT.png|thumb|right|300px|During the Galactic Civil War, all Imperial Army squads on Trammen were armed with light repeating blasters.]]
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Trammen was a heavily populated world<ref name="IS2" /> and a staging area for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="FDCR">[[Star Wars: Force and Destiny Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Force and Destiny'' Core Rulebook]]</ref> By the time shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], every [[line squad]] of the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] on Trammen had been completely armed with [[Light repeating blaster/Legends|light repeating blasters]]. That fact was eventually noted by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Historian/Legends|historian]] [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Arhul Hextrophon/Legends|Arhul Hextrophon]] in a compilation of Imperial documents for Alliance [[Supreme Commander (Alliance)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] and other Rebel [[Officer/Legends|officers]].<ref name="IS2" />

==Behind the scenes==
Trammen was first mentioned in [[Greg Gorden]]'s [[1989]] ''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]'' that was published by [[West End Games]] for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="ISB">''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]''</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' subsequently placed the Trammen [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Trammen itself, in grid square O-11.<ref name="TEA" />
